title: Language consistency: English booking conversation must produce English confirmation
failing_behavior: When an English-speaking customer booked an appointment, the final confirmation message was sometimes in Vietnamese ('Lịch hẹn...đã được xác nhận'). This happened because biz._bookingState was cleared before _submitDirectBooking ran, causing lang to fall back from null to the default 'en' — but early builds used biz._bookingState.lang after the clear, which was undefined/null, causing a Vietnamese fallback.
root_cause: The EscalationEngine.create() path (old flow) read biz._bookingState.lang AFTER the state was cleared at line ~2171. State was cleared → lang=null → fell back to biz default language which was sometimes 'vi'. Fixed by switching to _submitDirectBooking which reads draft.lang (captured before clear).

conversation.content: I'd like a gel manicure with Tracy on Monday at 2pm

Thanks Sarah! What's your phone number?
[STATE:{"intent":"booking_request","services":["Gel Manicure"],"staff":"Tracy","date":"2026-04-13","time":"14:00","name":"Sarah","phone":null,"lang":"en","pendingAction":null,"existingBookingId":null}]

Perfect! Your Gel Manicure with Tracy on Monday at 2 PM is confirmed!
[BOOKING:{"services":["Gel Manicure"],"staff":"Tracy","date":"2026-04-13","time":"14:00","name":"Sarah","phone":"4085559876","lang":"en"}]
[ESCALATE:appointment]
[STATE:{"intent":"booking_request","services":["Gel Manicure"],"staff":"Tracy","date":"2026-04-13","time":"14:00","name":"Sarah","phone":"4085559876","lang":"en","pendingAction":null,"existingBookingId":null}]

notes: _submitDirectBooking captures lang from draft before state is cleared. _buildConfirmedNatural(biz, draft, lang) uses this draft.lang for all confirmation text. State clearing order does not affect confirmation language.
